name: 5p13_3_subtelomeric_SDF4_paralog
description: 5p13.3 SD block containing SDF4/CCDC127 paralogs and OR2W3-related olfactory-receptor duplicons. Part of the 5p13 microduplication syndrome critical region (Lebel 2012) which causes 5p13.3 duplication phenotype with developmental delay; flanking SDs mediate the recurrent rearrangement.

architecture.internal_structure: Two flanking SDs of ~150-300 kb at 95-97% identity containing SDF4 and CCDC127 paralog tracts; unique core contains IRX2, IRX1 (distal to TERT region); shorter intervening olfactory-receptor duplicons.
